headline_seed: Family demands an independent probe after ICE officer fatally shoots a man in Houston - AP News
draft_text: Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, 52, was fatally shot by an ICE officer in Houston July 7. He had lived in the U.S. for 35 years and had three American-citizen sons. DHS has released no video. CBS News and The Guardian report his family is demanding an independent investigation.
